PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\ServBay" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\ServBay" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\$env:USERNAME\\ServBay" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(netstat -ano | Where-Object { $_ -match "LISTENING" } | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_ -split "\\s+"; $port = \($parts[2] -split ":"\)[-1]; $pid2 = $parts[-1]; try { $proc = \(Get-Process -Id $pid2 -ErrorAction Stop\).ProcessName } catch { $proc = "?" }; "$port`t$proc" } | Sort-Object { [int]\($_ -split "`t"\)[0] } | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(netstat -ano | Where-Object { $_ -match "LISTENING" } | ForEach-Object { $parts = $_ -split "\\s+"; $port = \($parts[2] -split ":"\)[-1]; $pid2 = $parts[-1]; try { $proc = \(Get-Process -Id $pid2 -ErrorAction Stop\).ProcessName } catch { $proc = "?" }; "$port`t$proc" } | Sort-Object { [int]\($_ -split "`t"\)[0] } | Select-Object -Skip 30 -First 30)
